era: Noise Rock. E=6 -- sludgy, heavy, melodic undertow. Return from degree 111. Sargent House. v1.49.355.

location.formative: Seattle heavy continuum. Melvins, TAD, Boris lineage.
location.career: Helms Alee. 2007-present. Sargent House. Noise Rock.

theory_nodes.concept: Three-voice vocal democracy -- all three members sing, male/female, clean/harsh, unpredictable trading. Rare in heavy music. Vocal range mirrors instrumental range.
examples: Ben Verellen: gruff, low, sludge-metal vocals.
Dana James: higher register, clean, melodic.
theory_nodes.description: Three-voice vocal democracy. Male/female, clean/harsh. Heavy music rarity.

theory_nodes.concept: Seattle heavy continuum -- Melvins to TAD to Boris to Helms Alee. Sludge lineage through four decades. Heavy music as Seattle tradition beyond grunge.
theory_nodes.description: Seattle heavy continuum. Four decades of sludge lineage.

cross_references.relationship: Back-to-back E=6. Motorik (213) vs. sludge (214). Same energy, different methods.
RETURN! 103-degree gap. The pair returns together (Kinski 110, Helms Alee 111).
Noise rock (214) to math rock (215). Heavy to intricate. Both Capitol Hill.
